qa_pairs.question: What happens once a CCDB account request has been approved?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a CCDB account request has been approved, you will receive a notification email.

qa_pairs.question: What important identifier should I note after my CCDB account is approved?
qa_pairs.answer: You should note your CCRI (Role Identifier).

qa_pairs.question: If I am a Principal Investigator (PI), what must I do with my CCRI?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are a PI, you will need to provide your CCRI to all Group Members that you will be sponsoring.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I forget my CCRI?
qa_pairs.answer: If you forget your CCRI, you can log in to the system and retrieve it.

qa_pairs.question: What personal information should I remember for logging into CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: You should note the email you used to register and the password you have created.

qa_pairs.question: As a PI, what is the next step for my Group Members after I complete the CCDB registration process?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are a PI, all of the Group Members you want to sponsor should register for CCDB accounts.

qa_pairs.question: How does a PI confirm Group Members who register for CCDB accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: A PI will need to confirm every individual who registers with CCDB using their CCRI.
